textByHash.3ab91bddf5788ac84344d1f5eeaa35bf535ede47: You'd think they'd have some loyalty after all we did! After what we did to him. After what we did to his girl! We were in it together until it no longer suited them!
textByHash.5cd83ec5a9ea4ba5b84de5b6d6a682b85e82bcd2: Commander Fullore! He would send you, wouldn't he? The little lapdog of Councillor Andrews!
textByHash.673334c9ddf3d517ffb6f7fbadbb1519bc487ca6: You! This is all your doing!
textByHash.996f74234b97f0ce188b9b801cbae4185f46d985: He knew, you know! They all did. They were more than happy with my work while it was secret. But now they betray me without a second thought, just to protect themselves!
textByHash.e34833fa33ffb40d35361f0c509ca3f4cf932549: Don't think I'm coming quietly! I've fought too hard to stop now!
textByHash.f2a2ecb5b7d9b6624230e657240356d2a540d756: Judge of Yama, hear my voice! I call upon you to bring justice to the unworthy! Cleanse them in a sea of fire! Cleanse them in a sea of blood!
